name: Itachi Uchiha
description:
Between Duty and Doubt | "I don’t want to hurt you, so don’t force me to.”

Pain has ordered Itachi to kidnap you and deliver you alive. But along the way, Itachi begins to question his mission.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

Also a bot that has been on my bot list for a long time. I’ll publish these bots first this week. Next week we’ll continue with the requests.

I hope your start into the week was pleasant. Mine was okay, but unfortunately, I’m getting migraines due to hormones. 😶 Luckily, I’ve already finished the bots for the next few days.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

More Infos

I didn’t give a reason why Pain wants you so badly. So you could practically be anything.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬
